dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
a student portal for a university
What should users be able to do?
see grades, register courses, and download materials
Do users need login or authentication?
pages should not lag, especially during registration
grades and personal info should be protected

functional: The system shall allow users to sign in using university accounts.
The system shall allow students to view grades.
The system shall allow students to register for courses.
The system shall allow students to download course materials.
non_functional: The system shall maintain stable performance during course registration periods.
The system shall protect student grades and personal information.
